# ona_secret (List Resource)

Lists Ona secret metadata for one scope. Secret values are never read or returned.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_secret" "organization" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
  config { scope = "organization" }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scope` (String) Secret scope: organization, project, user, or service_account.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID. Defaults to the authenticated organization.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID required for project scope.
- `service_account_id` (String) Service account ID required for service_account scope.
- `user_id` (String) User ID. Defaults to the authenticated user for user scope.
